etymology.description: 𡍬 (phonetic) + 貝 (semantic, 'cowry') -> means 'to sell; trade' -> reduced to 士 and 四 in the current form
etymology.interpretation: The character combines the phonetic 𡍬, which later evolved into 士(士) (shì, 'scholar') and 四(四) (sì, 'four'), with the semantic 貝(貝) (bèi, 'cowry'), symbolizing the concept of selling or trading goods, represented by the cowry shell.
